subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, what thou didst write was noted. Verily, that which hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه آنچه واقع شده
subcodes.subjects: @justice and mercy, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment
